posts.author: JennyA (Jenny Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys,

I’m wanting to use the Board Updates widget on a Top Level Project Board that displays updates across a number of project boards - in the FAQ Article on this it details being able to select which boards you want this widget to draw from, however, when I view my settings to select this, there are no settings available to choose from - can you advise?

image1454×818 126 KB

Many thanks,

Jenny
